A clean, effortless workflow from start to finish.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before downloading SqueezeIt.

What files can SqueezeIt compress?

PDF documents and images including JPG, PNG, TIFF, HEIC, GIF, and WebP.

Is SqueezeIt free to try?

Use this section to describe your App Store pricing, trial, or one-time purchase details.

Does SqueezeIt reduce image and PDF quality?

SqueezeIt is designed to reduce file size while keeping files clear and practical for sharing.

Where are my files processed?

Your files stay on your Mac during compression, keeping the workflow simple and private.

Make your PDFs & Images smaller. Effortlessly.

Download SqueezeIt today and start saving space in just a few clicks.
